prompt: Create a cinematic character exploration sheet for a premium neo-noir thriller film. A charismatic young male protagonist with a sculpted jawline, sharp cheekbones, textured beard fade, intense eyes, and calm dominant body language. He wears a custom midnight-black velvet suit with metallic detailing, layered jewelry, luxury rings, and an expensive chronograph watch. Include cinematic close-up portraits, side-profile emotion studies, action stance references, beard and hairstyle detailing, luxury fabric texture studies, hand pose sketches, and director-style annotation notes. Mood: moody noir lighting, glowing reflections, soft smoke atmosphere, deep shadows, cinematic bokeh, glossy luxury editorial look. Visual concepts: Crimson suit male reflected through shattered crystal panels, Silver trench coat male inside mirrored tunnel reflections, Emerald fashion suit male fractured through floating prism glass, White monochrome outfit male in distorted chrome geometry, Dark hoodie male under rain-lit neon reflections. High-fashion cinematic concept art, futuristic gallery installation aesthetic, luxury fashion campaign energy, surreal mirrored environment.
